- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should be customizable to meet specific organizational needs** — Customization options should include adding custom leave types, setting rules, and integrating with other HR systems.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should track public holidays and employee entitlements** — The system should account for public holidays and whether employees are entitled to take the day off or receive additional pay.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should handle leave requests for part-time employees fairly** — Leave entitlements for part-time employees should be pro-rated based on their working hours.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should accommodate leave requests from remote or flexible workers** — The system should allow real-time tracking of leave taken by remote employees and provide an online request interface.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should provide a self-service portal for employees** — The portal should allow employees to view their leave balance, request leave, and check the status of their requests from any device.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should send notifications and alerts for leave requests** — Notifications should inform employees and managers about leave requests, approvals, and low leave balances via email, SMS, or push notifications.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should ensure compliance with relevant leave laws and regulations** — The system should adhere to laws such as the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) in the United States.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should have robust data security measures** — Security measures should protect employee personal and leave information from unauthorized access, including encrypted data storage.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should integrate with other HR systems for seamless data exchange** — Integration with time and attendance systems or performance management systems will streamline HR processes.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should be accessible from smartphones and tablets** — Mobile accessibility will allow employees to manage leave requests and approvals on the go.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should provide training and support materials** — Training resources should include video tutorials, user guides, and live support options for effective system use.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should allow customizable approval workflows** — The system should enable organizations to set up different approval chains for various leave types.
- [2023-05-25] **Comprehensive leave management system should accurately calculate leave accruals** — The system should support different accrual rates and schedules based on organizational policies.
